atomResults.missingDetails: One compile-breaking issue remains: _OiActivityFeedList (lib/src/modules/oi_activity_feed.dart:210-218) has its constructor parameter still declared as `required this.hasMore` (line 212) while the field was renamed to `final bool moreAvailable` (line 221). In Dart, `this.hasMore` in a constructor requires a field named `hasMore`; since that field no longer exists the code will not compile. Additionally the call-site at line 195 passes `moreAvailable: moreAvailable` but the constructor parameter is named `hasMore`, creating a second compile error. The test description at test/src/primitives/scroll/oi_infinite_scroll_test.dart:71 still reads 'hasMore=false: ...' (cosmetic only — the code under test uses `moreAvailable: false` correctly). All other previously-flagged is/has-prefixed boolean renames are correct in this diff.
atomResults.recommendedFix: In lib/src/modules/oi_activity_feed.dart, change line 212 from `required this.hasMore,` to `required this.moreAvailable,`. This resolves both the initializing-formal mismatch and the named-parameter mismatch at the call-site (line 195). No other source changes are needed. Optionally rename the test description at oi_infinite_scroll_test.dart:71 from 'hasMore=false: ...' to 'moreAvailable=false: ...' for consistency.

notes: This iteration fixed the majority of the flagged boolean naming violations: OiInfiniteScroll.hasMore → moreAvailable, OiListView.hasMore → moreAvailable, OiActivityFeed.hasMore → moreAvailable, OiChat.hasOlderMessages → olderMessagesAvailable, OiFileNode.isFolder → folder, OiPlatformData.isKeyboardVisible → keyboardVisible, OiGradientStyle.isLinear → linear (class also renamed from OiGradient to OiGradientStyle), OiSelectOption.disabled → enabled, OiRadioOption.disabled → enabled. A dedicated naming-convention test file now exists (test/src/naming_conventions_test.dart) with two assertions scanning lib/src for is/has-prefixed booleans. However, one compile-breaking defect remains: _OiActivityFeedList constructor at oi_activity_feed.dart:212 still uses `required this.hasMore` while the field is `moreAvailable`, causing a Dart compile error that prevents the test suite from running. Until this is fixed REQ-0017 cannot be marked covered.
